theme_archetype.rationale: Finance requires trust and stability. A Light theme with warm, organic undertones (bone-white backgrounds, sage accents) prevents the app from feeling cold or intimidating. Glassmorphism is used strategically to represent 'transparency' in the loan discovery process.

fonts.heading: 'Sora', sans-serif
fonts.install_command: Import Google Fonts for Sora and DM Sans in index.css

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tighter text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-medium tracking-tight text-slate-900

layout_and_grids.spacing_system: Generous spacing: use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Cards must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
layout_and_grids.landing_page: Bento 'Tetris' grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12) for the 14 Browse Loans categories to create visual tension and interest.
layout_and_grids.dashboard: Control Room grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-6. Every pixel utilized. Summary cards span 1 col, main recommendations span 2 cols.

component_guidelines.buttons: Use flat design with rounded-full geometry to feel approachable. Always explicitly set hover states.
component_guidelines.cards: Solid background, 1px border (#E2E8F0), no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
component_guidelines.navigation: Crystal Glass sticky header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) ensuring content underneath is visible but blurred.
component_guidelines.emi_calculator: Use Shadcn Slider for tactile input. Real-time visual feedback on repayment amounts. No hidden fees layout.
component_guidelines.market_charts: Use Recharts (AreaChart or LineChart). Monochromatic emerald scale for data visualization. Keep labels large and readable.
component_guidelines.dpdp_delete: Critical feature. Place prominently in account settings. Use Shadcn AlertDialog. Red destructive button. Plain language about data deletion (no dark patterns).
component_guidelines.chatbot: Floating widget in bottom right. Glassmorphism panel for the chat window.

icons_and_assets.style: Clean, line-based, stroke-width 1.5. Matches the geometric nature of DM Sans.

hero_abstract.description: Abstract 3D composition of pristine glass spheres and emerald green geometric shapes, conveying transparency.
hero_abstract.usage: Landing page hero section visual or abstract background

emi_3d_icon.description: Minimalist 3D icon of a modern calculator with floating green percentages.
emi_3d_icon.usage: Beside the EMI calculator tool or in feature highlights

chatbot_3d.description: Modern robotic AI chatbot assistant hovering above an emerald green base.
chatbot_3d.usage: Chatbot widget trigger icon or header

lifestyle_family.description: A joyful Indian family inside a home setting.

market_chart_bg.description: Close-up of a neon blue line chart on a grid, symbolizing data trends.
market_chart_bg.usage: Background for the Market Insights section

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must change state on hover. Buttons lighten, cards translate-y-1, text links get an underline or color shift.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Use framer-motion for staggered list entrance (e.g., the 72 products) to reduce cognitive overload.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over emerald green backgrounds is pure white. Avoid pale text on pale backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All buttons, links, inputs, and the Delete Account modal must include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="delete-account-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page layout, allowing for complex bento grids.
Use Shadcn UI for the dashboard, EMI calculator, and data tables.
For the 14 Loan Categories, implement a masonry or bento layout, not a simple grid of identical squares.
For the DPDP 'Delete Account' feature, create a dedicated settings view or modal that strictly adheres to transparency (clear warnings, no confusing opt-outs).
Integrate the provided media URLs. Do not use placeholders.
Ensure 'Sora' and 'DM Sans' are loaded via Google Fonts in your main HTML/CSS.
Implement the dark/light mode toggle. Ensure dark mode variables in tailwind config map background to slate-950 and text to slate-50, but default to light mode.
For React components (.jsx/.js files), use Framer Motion for smooth transitions.
